evidence.text:
A General-Purpose Environment Framework for Scalable Multimodal Agent Evaluation and RL # AgentArk English | [简体中文](README.zh-CN.md)

AgentArk is an open environment framework for multimodal agents: models can see interactive tasks, write actions as code or tool calls, receive verifiable feedback, and improve through evaluation, replay, or RL. The goal is not to freeze one benchmark. AgentArk is built as infrastructure for continuously growing interactive tasks. Its base environment
